name: Integrity International Bus
principals: Yan Wang (listed manager per source data)
recent_news: No M&A/news identified; no web presence directly tied to 'Integrity International Bus' at the Fontana, CA address. A separate California-based 'Integrity Transportation' (integritybus.net, est. 2004) appears unrelated; 'Yan International Group Inc' is a separate Fontana entity led by Jason Wang/Yan Qu.
fit_notes: Single-location micro-operator with ~36 employees at residential Fontana address; no confirmed independent web/DOT presence specific to this name. Low-priority tuck-in candidate pending phone-verified scale and district contract confirmation.

name: Lia's School Bus SVC LLC
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Entity is registered in Texas as Lia's School Bus Service LLC; minimal public web presence beyond Bizapedia/state registration.
fit_notes: Small Houston-area LLC at a residential address (Dunwoody Dr); appears to be an independent micro-contractor likely serving charter/private schools or HISD subcontracting. Too small in isolation but could be a bolt-on if owner-operator is approaching retirement.

name: Valley Oasis Transportation
districts_or_customers: Twin Cities / Minneapolis metro school districts (unspecified)
recent_news: Active independent operator; Kona Equity flags ~$5.6M revenue (small-fleet scale). No M&A or PE ownership identified.
fit_notes: Mixed-modal operator (school + SPED + NEMT) in Twin Cities, an attractive Summit footprint extension into MN. Diversified revenue and metro density make it a credible tuck-in if owner is willing; principal identification needed.

name: It Takes A Vlg Sch Trnsprtn
recent_news: No web/DOT/news presence identified for an 'It Takes A Village School Transportation' operator in Columbus, OH. Marshelle Payne (Worthington, OH) appears in SBA PPP records as a sole proprietor; an unrelated 'It Takes a Village Columbus LLC' offers doula services. Possible micro-operator subcontracting to Columbus City Schools or charter schools, or a data-quality artifact.
fit_notes: Residential-address micro-entity with no verifiable bus operation footprint; unlikely to be an independent fleet operator at meaningful scale. Deprioritize for tuck-in unless phone/state-registration confirms an actual yellow-bus contract.

name: Christianson Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Billerica Boys & Girls Club afterschool program
recent_news: No M&A activity identified. Long-tenured family-run operator (est. 1999, LLC incorporated 2002); BBB A+ rating; ~25 buses, ~24 drivers per FMCSA/data aggregators.
fit_notes: Classic Summit tuck-in profile: 25-bus family-owned MA contractor, ~27 years in business, single-district anchor (Billerica) with afterschool/charter add-ons, sole-manager succession risk. North-of-Boston density complements MA platform routes; warrants direct outreach.
